name: io.github.codespar/mcp-coinbase
description: MCP server for Coinbase Advanced Trade — exchange / treasury API. Account balances, market data, orders, fills, transaction summary.

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_ACCESS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Legacy HMAC API key from the Coinbase dashboard (coinbase.com/settings/api)

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: API secret paired with the access key — used for HMAC-SHA256 request signing
